---
title: "L3 detection-efficiency study"
subtitle: "Measuring romancal SourceCatalogStep recovery on simulated Roman L3 mosaics"
---

## What this is

A reproducible pipeline to measure the detection efficiency of the Roman
L3 (`MosaicPipeline`) + `SourceCatalogStep` stack as a function of:

- sky position (multiple pointing groups at different ecliptic
  latitudes тЖТ different zodiacal backgrounds),
- source type (point sources vs exponential-profile galaxies,
  matched in position and magnitude),
- source magnitude (F158, 23.0тАУ25.0 in 0.1-mag bins),
- `SourceCatalogStep` parameters (primarily `kernel_fwhm`).

The workflow is five phases with a user checkpoint at the end of each:

1. **Pointing selection** тАФ pick a set of HLWAS F158 re-observed pairs
   spread across the sky, each with a well-defined solar-elongation
   window.
2. **Skycell / SCA overlap analysis** тАФ find which skycells the pair
   geometries reach mosaic depth 6, and enumerate the (pointing, SCA)
   pairs that need to be simulated.
3. **Source catalog generation** тАФ build matched star/galaxy truth
   catalogs on a grid inside each target skycell.
4. **L2 + L3 simulation** тАФ run `romanisim` for each required
   (pointing, SCA) combination, build the skycell associations, and
   coadd with `MosaicPipeline`.
5. **Source detection + efficiency analysis** тАФ run `SourceCatalogStep`
   at default parameters (5a), then sweep `kernel_fwhm` (5b) and
   optionally `snr_threshold` / `npixels` (5c). Compare recovered
   catalogs against the Phase-3 truth.

This sits alongside the existing [Full run](../full/design.qmd) report
and reuses the same `roman_l2_job` pixi environment, CRDS cache, and
STPSF data.

## Data locations

Code, configs, and selection artefacts live in this repo. The bulk L2
and L3 binary products тАФ which will be the dominant cost once Phase 4
runs тАФ will live under `output/detection/` on the host, outside of
version control. A pointer file will be added when Phase 4 starts.

## Status

Phases 1-5a are complete for pair 11119. Efficiency baseline
established тАФ 50% completeness at F158 mag 25.4 (stars) / 24.6
(galaxies). Ready for either Phase 5b (`kernel_fwhm` sweep on the
existing mosaic) or the skycell-driven Phase 1-2 refactor + Phase 4b
scale-up to 5тАУ25 skycells.

- [Phase 1 тАФ pointing selection](phase1_pointings.qmd)
- [Phase 2 тАФ skycell / SCA overlap](phase2_skycells.qmd)
- [Phase 3 тАФ truth-catalog generation](phase3_catalogs.qmd)
- [Phase 4a тАФ L2 + L3 validation](phase4a_validation.qmd)
- [Phase 5a тАФ detection baseline](phase5a_detection.qmd)
